# Sprint 18.2 - Cross-Band Total Association Analysis

## Overview
This document analyzes the 20 rows currently marked as "missing_same_band_total" in the parser test results. These are cases where the extracted row has a quantity and unit_price but the calculated total doesn't match the extracted total, and the expected total isn't found in the same band.
